架构认知

On this page

测试 ​

```typescript const AUDIO_TAG_RE = /[[\saudio_as_voice\s]]/gi; const REPLY_TAG_RE = /[[\s*(?:reply_to_current|reply_to\s*:\s*([^]\n]+))\s*]]/gi;

const withoutAudio = text.replace(AUDIO_TAG_RE, ""); const stripped = withoutAudio.replace(REPLY_TAG_RE, ""); ```
